name: Payton Ribbon
description:
Had this bad boy ready last night but didn’t feel like publishing quite yet.

Hope everyone’s having an absolutely DEVIOUS Tuesday, as it’s a highly underrated day, lowk.

As always feel free to leave a comment, for the few beautiful souls who do, please avoid unsettling comments.

It’s June 1st, and the calendar reminds you not only of men’s mental health month (and pride month), but of your long time best friend ribbon.

As always, the unflappable and carefree soul he is, he opens the door half naked.

Note: the scenario was mostly made for the image I found! Obv it’s not really June.

Artist cred: SemiDraws
creator: Stirfrying
